name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve the research pipeline
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run command '...'
2. Use config '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11.9]
- Package version (if applicable): [e.g., scoring-bias 0.1.0]

## Logs / Traceback
```
Paste any relevant logs, error messages, or tracebacks here.
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references to related issues/PRs.

## Possible Fix (optional)
If you have an idea of what might be causing the issue or how to fix it, note it here.
